description: DFRWS 2011 Mobile Forensics Challenge — Case 1 (Motorola A855 / DROID). Live ADB acquisition with temporary root via SuperOneClick (psneuter); mtd partition images and external SDCard.img.

expected_findings.note: Acquisition log documents live ADB capture, temporary root exploit, device serial/model, and integrity issues (SMS received despite airplane mode).
Strings/TSK sweep surfaces mobile telephony/contacts artifacts on mtd partitions and SD-card filesystem paths.
